mapper.select: SELECT U.USER_ID AS "userId", U.USER_NAME AS "userName", U.PASSWORD_HASH AS "passwordHash", U.BRANCH_ID AS "branchId", U.AUTH_GROUP_ID AS "authGroupId", G.AUTH_GROUP_NAME AS "authGroupName", U.USE_YN AS "useYn", U.LAST_LOGIN_TIME AS "lastLoginTime" FROM OM_USER U LEFT JOIN OM_AUTH_GROUP G ON U.AUTH_GROUP_ID = G.AUTH_GROUP_ID WHERE U.USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT USER_ID AS "userId" FROM OM_USER WHERE PASSWORD_HASH IS NULL OR TRIM(PASSWORD_HASH) = ''

SELECT REFRESH_TOKEN_ID AS "refreshTokenId", USER_ID AS "userId", TOKEN_HASH AS "tokenHash", TOKEN_FAMILY_ID AS "tokenFamilyId", ISSUED_AT AS "issuedAt", EXPIRES_AT AS "expiresAt", ROTATED_YN AS "rotatedYn", REVOKED_YN AS "revokedYn" FROM TCF_REFRESH_TOKEN WHERE TOKEN_HASH = #{tokenHash}
mapper.update: UPDATE TCF_REFRESH_TOKEN SET ROTATED_YN = 'Y', LAST_USED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE REFRESH_TOKEN_ID = #{refreshTokenId}
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO TCF_TOKEN_DENYLIST (ISSUER, JTI, USER_ID, EXPIRES_AT, REVOKED_AT, REVOKE_REASON) KEY (ISSUER, JTI) VALUES (#{issuer}, #{jti}, #{userId}, #{expiresAt}, #{revokedAt}, #{revokeReason})
